prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9b365c51`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `9b365c51`. The rule is: read the full-height guide columns on the left in left-to-right order, decompose the right-side `8` area into left-to-right rectangles by consecutive identical occupied-row column profiles, then recolor those rectangles in guide order and clear the guide. I used the Opus hint as a starting point and discarded the Sonnet “lane propagation” hint; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b365c51/notes.md#L1).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b365c51/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b365c51/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9b365c51/generator.py#L1). No new primitive was needed. The generator builds the latent family directly: fixed left guide columns plus a left-to-right sequence of solid `8` rectangles on the right, with frequent touching/merging and occasional gaps, matching the official examples’ structure.

Validation passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples, build of `1000` examples, and `1000/1000` generated-example verification. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b365c51/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b365c51/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b365c51/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b365c51/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9b365c51/previews/preview_03.png).
